ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "upc" TEXT /* Universal Product Code (UPC) of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "flavorscent" TEXT /* Flavor or scent of the product */,
  "typeofgrain" TEXT /* Type of grain used in the product */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of package (e.g., BOX, CUP) */,
  "vol_eq" REAL /* Volume equivalent of the product */,
  "price_pr" REAL /* Price per unit */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently active in the inventory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Product description */,
  "category" TEXT /* Product category */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Product subcategory */,
  "weight" REAL /* Product weight */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Product dimensions */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "total_dollars" REAL /* Total revenue from the sale */,
  "sale_week" TEXT /* Week of the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., CASH, CREDIT, DEBIT) */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory (e.g., IN_STOCK, OUT_OF_STOCK, ON_ORDER) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store placing the order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier receiving the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "order_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., PENDING, SHIPPED, DELIVERED) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the employee works */,
  "name" TEXT /* Employee name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Employee email */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Employee phone number */,
  "role" TEXT /* Employee role (e.g., STORE_MANAGER, SALES_ASSOCIATE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
